title: General Mariano Alvarez Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting General Mariano Alvarez with a Z-Score of +3.17. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in General Mariano Alvarez is characterized by high temperatures and humidity levels of 78%. 
 The city is experiencing a critical heat wave with a CDD of 10.1 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The low wind speed of 1.8 km/h is exacerbating the heat, making it feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
